# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

| Version | Supported |
|---------|-----------|
| 1.x     | Yes       |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please **do not** open a public GitHub issue for security vulnerabilities.

Instead, use [GitHub's private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/palhamel/mailfilter-ai/security/advisories/new)
or email the maintainer directly.

You can expect an acknowledgment within 48 hours and a resolution within 14 days for critical issues.
